_doc: Canonical post-meal wait profiles. Profiles describe how long to wait after eating this item or meal before the next meal.

FRUIT_DENSE_OR_DRIED_45_60.description: Dense fresh fruit or dried fruit; wait 45 to 60 minutes before the next meal.

FRUIT_WATERY_20_30.description: Fresh watery fruit; wait 20 to 30 minutes before the next meal.

PROPER_MEAL_NO_MEAT_3H.description: Proper meal without meat; wait about 3 hours before the next meal.

PROPER_MEAL_WITH_MEAT_4H.description: Proper meal with meat; wait about 4 hours before the next meal.

RANDOM_MEAL_UP_TO_8H.description: Heavy or random mixed meal; wait 5 to 8 hours before the next meal.

RAW_VEG_OR_SALAD_2H.description: Raw vegetables or salad; wait about 2 hours before the next meal.
